sentences.target: Tu peux charger mon téléphone, s’il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pø ʃaʁʒe mɔ̃ telefɔn, sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu peux charger mon téléphone, s’il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pø ʃaʁʒe mɔ̃ telefɔn, sil tə plɛ/
translations.en: Can you charge my phone, please.
translations.it: Per favore, carica il mio telefono.
translations.ru: Пожалуйста, поставь мой телефон на зарядку.
translations.vi: Làm ơn sạc điện thoại cho tôi.
translations.uk: Будь ласка, постав мій телефон на зарядку.
translations.hi: कृपया मेरा फोन चार्ज कर दो.
translations.el: Σε παρακαλώ, φόρτισε το κινητό μου.
translations.ja: 私のスマホを充電してください.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'charger' to express ability.
Infinitive verb, complement of the modal 'peux'; takes 'téléphone' as its direct object.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'téléphone'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'charger'.
Elided 'si' before 'il' in the fixed polite formula 's’il te plaît'; functions as subordinating conjunction 'if'.
Clitic pronoun, 2nd person singular indirect object; argument of 'plaît' in the idiom.
3rd person singular present of 'plaire'; part of the idiom 's’il te plaît' (‘please’), with implicit subject 'il'.

translations.de: Ich räume jetzt den Geschirrspüler ein.
translations.zh-Hans: 我现在在把餐具装进洗碗机.
translations.yue: 我而家喺度擺啲碗碟入洗碗機.
translations.vi: Bây giờ tôi đang xếp bát đĩa vào máy rửa chén.
translations.ar: أضع الأطباق في غسالة الصحون الآن.
translations.nl: Ik ben de vaatwasser nu aan het inruimen.
translations.hi: मैं अभी डिशवॉशर में बर्तन रख रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Sekarang saya sedang memasukkan piring ke mesin cuci piring.
translations.ro: Acum încarc mașina de spălat vase.
translations.ja: 今、食洗機に食器を入れています.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present 1st person singular; transitive, taking 'le lave-vaisselle' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'lave-vaisselle'.
Compound common noun, masculine; direct object of 'charge'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb 'charge'.

sentences.target: Vous chargez les courses dans le coffre.
sentences.reading: /vu ʃaʁʒe le kuʁs dɑ̃ lə kɔfʁ/

translations.fr: Vous chargez les courses dans le coffre.
translations.ipa: /vu ʃaʁʒe le kuʁs dɑ̃ lə kɔfʁ/
translations.en: You’re loading the groceries into the trunk.
translations.es: Estás cargando la compra en el maletero.
translations.de: Sie laden die Einkäufe in den Kofferraum.
translations.it: Stai caricando la spesa nel bagagliaio.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在把买的东西装进后备箱.
translations.yue: 你而家將買返嚟嘅嘢擺入車尾箱.
translations.pt: Você está colocando as compras no porta-malas.
translations.he: אתה מעמיס את הקניות לתא המטען.
translations.vi: Bạn đang chất đồ vừa mua vào cốp xe.
translations.ar: أنت تضع المشتريات في صندوق السيارة.
translations.nl: Je laadt de boodschappen in de kofferbak.
translations.hi: आप किराने का सामान डिक्की में रख रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Du laster varene inn i bagasjerommet.
translations.id: Kamu sedang memasukkan belanjaan ke bagasi mobil.
translations.sv: Du lastar in varorna i bagageutrymmet.
translations.da: Du læsser varerne ind i bagagerummet.
translations.ja: 買った物をトランクに積み込んでいる.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person plural/formal; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present 2nd person plural; transitive, taking 'les courses' as direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner of 'courses'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of 'chargez'.
Preposition introducing the prepositional phrase indicating location/destination.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'coffre'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: On doit charger la tablette avant le film.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dwa ʃaʁʒe la tablɛt avɑ̃ lə film/

translations.fr: On doit charger la tablette avant le film.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dwa ʃaʁʒe la tablɛt avɑ̃ lə film/
translations.en: We need to charge the tablet before the movie.
translations.es: Tenemos que cargar la tableta antes de la película.
translations.de: Wir müssen das Tablet vor dem Film aufladen.
translations.it: Dobbiamo caricare il tablet prima del film.
translations.ko: 영화 보기 전에 태블릿을 충전해야 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们需要在电影前给平板充电.
translations.yue: 我哋要喺睇戲之前叉部平板.
translations.ru: Нам нужно зарядить планшет перед фильмом.
translations.pt: Precisamos carregar o tablet antes do filme.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להטעין את הטאבלט לפני הסרט.
translations.tr: Filmden önce tableti şarj etmemiz gerekiyor.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần sạc máy tính bảng trước khi xem phim.
translations.ar: علينا شحن الجهاز اللوحي قبل الفيلم.
translations.nl: We moeten de tablet opladen voor de film.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно зарядити планшет перед фільмом.
translations.hu: A film előtt fel kell töltenünk a táblagépet.
translations.hi: फिल्म से पहले हमें टैबलेट चार्ज करना है.
translations.el: Πρέπει να φορτίσουμε το τάμπλετ πριν από την ταινία.
translations.nb: Vi må lade opp nettbrettet før filmen.
translations.id: Kita perlu mengisi daya tablet sebelum film.
translations.sv: Vi behöver ladda surfplattan före filmen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să încărcăm tableta înainte de film.
translations.da: Vi skal oplade tabletten før filmen.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy ladata tabletti ennen elokuvaa.
translations.ja: 映画の前にタブレットを充電する必要がある.

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun; here colloquial 'we'.
Modal auxiliary, present 3rd person singular; expresses obligation and selects the infinitive 'charger'.
Infinitive verb, complement of 'doit'; takes 'la tablette' as direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'tablette'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'charger'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'film'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'avant'.
